steps.title: Find the sentence subject
steps.content: The sentence needs a subject for the verb phrase "led developers to invent the dual-core chip." The event of reaching the power wall must function as that subject.

steps.title: Use a gerund subject
steps.content: A creates a separate clause and leaves "led" without a clear subject. C creates a dependent "when" clause. D creates a prepositional phrase that cannot serve as the subject. A gerund phrase can act as the sentence subject. The answer is B.
